sections.paragraph:
verb להיבעת

be frightened, startled, terrorized

verb לבעת

to terrify, scare, alarm, frighten

verb להתבעת

be terrified, scared, alarmed, frightened

verb להבעית

to terrify, scare, alarm, frighten

verb הובעת

be terrified, scared, alarmed, frightened

verb לבעת (>>ביעת)

to terrify, scare, alarm, frighten

adverb בעתו

in good time, at the right time, opportunely, seasonably

masculine noun

phobia, strong and persistent irrational fear
